name: Monsoon
description: Raindrops caught at different moments of their fall, with splash rings blooming below — every redraw advances the storm by one beat.

code.style: --rain: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --dx: @rand(12%, 74%); --dy: @rand(0%, 56%); --so: @rand(0.3, 0.9); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: var(--dx); top: var(--dy); width: 14%; height: 30%; background: var(--rain); clip-path: @shape(drop); transform: rotate(180deg); transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.2) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 30%; bottom: 5%; width: 40%; height: 11%; border: calc(14px / @Y) solid var(--color4); border-radius: 50%; opacity: var(--so); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
